title: All the latest in AI ‘music’
description:
People don’t like that they can’t identify AI music. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge	

AI has touched every part of the music industry, from sample sourcing and demo recording, to serving up digital liner notes and building playlists. There are technical and legal challenges, fierce ethical debates, and fears that the slop will simply crush working musicians through sheer volume. Is it art or just an output? What exactly is “really active“? Whether it’s a new model or a new lawsuit, we’re covering it all to make sure you don’t miss any major developments. 
So follow along as we dig into the latest in AI “music.”


					
Suno leans into customization with v5.5
			
The music industry has embraced a “don’t ask, don’t tell” policy about AI.
			
North Carolina man pleads guilty to AI music streaming fraud.
			
Apple Music adds optional labels for AI songs and visuals
			
Qobuz is automatically detecting and labeling AI music now, too.
			
This Chainsmokers-approved AI music producer is j
summary_ko: AI 음악 산업이 샘플 소싱부터 플레이리스트 구성까지 전 영역에 확산되고 있습니다. Suno의 v5.5 커스터마이제이션 기능과 Apple Music의 AI 음악 라벨링 등 기술적 발전이 계속되고 있습니다. 그러나 저작권 소송과 AI 음악 식별 불가 문제, 뮤지션들의 생계 위협 우려 등 윤리적 논란도 함께 증가하고 있습니다.
summary_en: AI has penetrated every aspect of the music industry from sample sourcing to playlist creation. Technical advances continue with Suno's v5.5 customization features and Apple Music's AI music labeling system. However, ethical controversies are growing including copyright lawsuits, inability to identify AI music, and concerns about threats to musicians' livelihoods.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 음악을 활용한 마케팅 콘텐츠 제작 시 저작권 및 윤리적 이슈를 신중히 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully consider copyright and ethical issues when using AI music for marketing content creation.
key_points: AI music tools like Suno v5.5 offer enhanced customization capabilities
Major platforms like Apple Music and Qobuz are implementing AI music labeling
Legal and ethical challenges persist around AI music identification and copyright
Volume of AI-generated music threatens traditional musicians' market share

title: What AI disruption means for experimental ad budgets
description: The 2026 ad budget is now a lab experiment as marketers boost experimental budgets for AI and emerging channels.
summary_ko: 2026년 광고 예산이 실험실과 같은 성격을 띠고 있습니다. 마케터들이 AI와 신흥 채널에 대한 실험적 예산을 늘리고 있습니다. AI 혁신이 광고 예산 배분에 근본적 변화를 가져오고 있습니다.
summary_en: The 2026 ad budget has become like a lab experiment. Marketers are boosting experimental budgets for AI and emerging channels. AI disruption is bringing fundamental changes to advertising budget allocation.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통적인 광고 채널 외에 AI 기반 신규 채널에 대한 실험적 투자를 확대해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should expand experimental investments in AI-based new channels beyond traditional advertising channels.
key_points: 2026 ad budgets are increasingly experimental in nature
Marketers are allocating more budget to AI and emerging channels
Traditional budget allocation models are being disrupted

title: After newsroom cuts, The Washington Post turns to creator-led video deals
description: The Washington Post is betting on creator content to open up new revenue and audiences, after newsroom layoffs.
summary_ko: 워싱턴 포스트가 편집부 감원 이후 크리에이터 주도의 비디오 거래에 집중하고 있습니다. 새로운 수익원과 독자층 확보를 위해 크리에이터 콘텐츠에 투자하고 있습니다. 전통 미디어의 크리에이터 경제 진출 사례로 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: The Washington Post is focusing on creator-led video deals after newsroom layoffs. They are investing in creator content to secure new revenue streams and audiences. This represents a notable case of traditional media entering the creator economy.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통 미디어와 크리에이터의 협업 모델을 활용하여 새로운 콘텐츠 파트너십 기회를 모색할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can explore new content partnership opportunities by leveraging collaboration models between traditional media and creators.
key_points: Washington Post pivoting to creator content after staff cuts
Strategy aims to open new revenue streams and reach new audiences
Traditional media increasingly embracing creator economy models

title: AI influencer discovery tools are changing how agencies cast creators
description: As creator spending grows among brand advertisers, agencies are using AI to automate much of the influencer marketing workflow. Now, that includes casting.
summary_ko: 에이전시들이 AI 인플루언서 발견 도구를 사용하여 크리에이터 캐스팅 방식을 변화시키고 있습니다. 브랜드 광고주들의 크리에이터 지출이 증가하면서 AI를 통한 인플루언서 마케팅 워크플로우 자동화가 확산되고 있습니다. 캐스팅 과정까지 AI가 담당하게 되었습니다.
summary_en: Agencies are using AI influencer discovery tools to change how they cast creators. As creator spending grows among brand advertisers, AI automation of influencer marketing workflows is expanding. The casting process is now being handled by AI.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 인플루언서 발견 도구를 활용하여 더 효율적이고 데이터 기반의 크리에이터 파트너십을 구축할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can build more efficient and data-driven creator partnerships by leveraging AI-based influencer discovery tools.
key_points: AI tools are transforming influencer discovery and casting processes
Creator spending continues to grow among brand advertisers
Automation is expanding across entire influencer marketing workflows

title: Pinterest bets measurement and SMBs will boost performance revenue
description: Vik Gupta (vp, gm of monetization) has been tasked with strengthening Pinterest’s push to become a permanent media plan fixture.
summary_ko: Pinterest가 측정 기능과 중소기업(SMB) 타겟팅을 통해 퍼포먼스 수익 증대에 베팅하고 있습니다. 수익화 담당 VP인 Vik Gupta가 Pinterest를 영구적인 미디어 플랜 요소로 만들기 위한 전략을 강화하고 있습니다. 플랫폼의 광고주 확보와 수익 모델 개선에 집중하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Pinterest is betting on measurement capabilities and SMB targeting to boost performance revenue. VP of monetization Vik Gupta is strengthening strategies to make Pinterest a permanent media plan fixture. The platform is focusing on advertiser acquisition and revenue model improvements.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 Pinterest의 강화된 측정 기능을 활용하여 시각적 콘텐츠 마케팅의 ROI를 더 정확하게 추적할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can more accurately track ROI of visual content marketing by leveraging Pinterest's enhanced measurement capabilities.
key_points: Pinterest focusing on measurement and SMB targeting for revenue growth
Platform aims to become permanent fixture in media plans
Enhanced monetization strategies under new leadership

title: Media Buying Briefing: What will Meta’s and YouTube’s legal losses mean for the marketplace?
description: As Meta and YouTube suffer defeats with damages in court, will media buyers steer clients away from them? Unlikely for now.
summary_ko: 메타와 유튜브가 법정에서 패소하며 손해배상 판결을 받았지만, 미디어 바이어들이 고객을 이들 플랫폼에서 이탈시킬 가능성은 낮아 보입니다. 당분간 광고주들의 주요 플랫폼으로서의 지위는 유지될 것으로 예상됩니다. 법적 리스크에도 불구하고 광고 생태계에서의 영향력은 지속될 전망입니다.
summary_en: Meta and YouTube have suffered legal defeats with damage awards, but media buyers are unlikely to steer clients away from these platforms for now. The platforms are expected to maintain their status as major advertising destinations despite legal setbacks. Their dominance in the advertising ecosystem appears to continue despite potential legal risks.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 메타와 유튜브의 법적 리스크를 모니터링하되, 단기적으로는 이들 플랫폼의 광고 효과와 도달률을 고려한 마케팅 전략을 유지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should monitor legal risks from Meta and YouTube while maintaining marketing strategies that leverage these platforms' advertising effectiveness and reach in the short term.
key_points: Meta and YouTube face legal defeats with damage awards
Media buyers unlikely to abandon these platforms despite legal issues
Platform dominance in advertising ecosystem remains strong

Daily engagement content strategy
Niche content targeting specific audiences

title: MCP Shifts AI from Chat to Work
description:
Model Context Protocol signals a shift from AI as a chat tool to an operator in a business.
The post MCP Shifts AI from Chat to Work appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 모델 컨텍스트 프로토콜(MCP)이 AI를 단순한 채팅 도구에서 실제 비즈니스 운영자로 전환시키는 변화를 이끌고 있습니다. 이는 AI가 비즈니스 워크플로우에 더 깊이 통합되어 실질적인 업무를 수행할 수 있게 하는 기술적 진보를 의미합니다. 전자상거래 영역에서 AI의 역할이 대화형 지원에서 업무 자동화로 확장되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is driving a shift from AI as a chat tool to an operator in business operations. This represents technological advancement that enables deeper AI integration into business workflows for actual work execution. The role of AI in e-commerce is expanding from conversational support to work automation.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 MCP 기술을 활용해 AI를 단순 고객 서비스를 넘어 주문 처리, 재고 관리, 마케팅 자동화 등 핵심 업무 영역에 통합하여 운영 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can leverage MCP technology to integrate AI beyond customer service into core business operations like order processing, inventory management, and marketing automation for enhanced operational efficiency.
key_points: MCP shifts AI from chat to business operation roles
Enables deeper AI integration into business workflows
Transforms AI from conversational tool to work automation

title: Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed
description:
The latest app from the team behind Bluesky is Attie, an AI assistant that lets you build your own algorithm. At the Atmosphere conference, Bluesky's former CEO, Jay Graber, and CTO Paul Frazee, unveiled Attie, which is powered by Anthropic's Claude and built on top of Bluesky's underlying AT Protocol (atproto). 
Attie allows users to create custom feeds using natural language. For example, you could ask for "posts about folklore, mythology, and traditional music, especially Celtic traditions." To start these custom feeds will be confined to a standalone Attie app. But the plan is to make them available in Bluesky and other atproto apps. 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 블루스카이 팀이 사용자 맞춤형 피드를 구성할 수 있는 AI 어시스턴트 'Attie'를 출시했습니다. Anthropic의 Claude를 기반으로 하며 자연어를 통해 커스텀 피드를 생성할 수 있습니다. 현재는 독립 앱으로 제공되지만 향후 블루스카이와 다른 AT 프로토콜 앱에서도 사용 가능할 예정입니다.
summary_en: Bluesky's team has launched 'Attie', an AI assistant that allows users to customize their feeds using natural language. Built on Anthropic's Claude and the AT Protocol, it enables custom feed creation through conversational commands. Currently available as a standalone app, it plans to expand to Bluesky and other atproto applications.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 콘텐츠 큐레이션 기술을 D2C 마케팅에 적용하여 고객별 맞춤형 제품 추천과 콘텐츠 경험을 제공할 수 있는 기회를 제시합니다.
so_what_en: This AI-powered content curation technology presents opportunities for D2C brands to implement personalized product recommendations and content experiences for individual customers.
key_points: Attie AI assistant enables custom feed creation using natural language
Built on Anthropic's Claude and AT Protocol infrastructure
Plans to expand from standalone app to broader platform integration

title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
description: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
summary_ko: OpenAI가 게이츠 재단과 함께 아시아 지역 재해 대응팀을 위한 AI 워크숍을 개최했습니다. 이 프로그램은 재해 상황에서 AI 기술을 실제 구조 작업에 활용하는 방법을 교육했습니다. 아시아 지역의 재해 대응 역량 강화를 위한 AI 기술 적용 사례로 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI conducted a workshop with the Gates Foundation to help disaster response teams in Asia implement AI technologies. The program focused on training teams to apply AI solutions in real disaster scenarios and rescue operations. This initiative highlights the practical application of AI technology for enhancing disaster response capabilities across Asia.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 재해 상황에서도 고객 서비스와 공급망을 유지할 수 있는 AI 기반 위기 대응 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should develop AI-powered crisis response systems to maintain customer service and supply chain operations during disaster situations.
key_points: OpenAI와 게이츠 재단이 아시아 재해 대응팀 대상 AI 워크숍 개최
재해 상황에서 AI 기술의 실질적 활용 방안 교육
아시아 지역 재해 대응 역량 강화에 AI 기술 적용

title: Context engineering is the real AI advantage in marketing
description:
AI performance depends on what it knows, not how you ask. Learn how to structure data and systems for better results.
The post Context engineering is the real AI advantage in marketing appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: MarTech.org에서 마케팅 분야에서 AI의 진정한 경쟁 우위는 컨텍스트 엔지니어링에 있다고 분석했습니다. AI 성능은 질문하는 방식보다 AI가 보유한 지식에 더 크게 의존한다고 설명합니다. 더 나은 결과를 위해 데이터와 시스템을 구조화하는 방법의 중요성을 강조했습니calls.
summary_en: MarTech.org analyzed that context engineering represents the real AI advantage in marketing. The article explains that AI performance depends more on what it knows rather than how you ask questions. It emphasizes the importance of structuring data and systems properly to achieve better AI results.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 프롬프트 최적화보다 고객 데이터와 시스템 구조화에 집중하여 마케팅 AI의 성과를 극대화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should focus on structuring customer data and systems rather than just prompt optimization to maximize marketing AI performance.
key_points: 컨텍스트 엔지니어링이 마케팅 AI의 핵심 경쟁 우위
AI 성능은 질문 방식보다 보유 지식에 더 의존적
데이터와 시스템 구조화의 중요성 강조
